text.title: Weekly Architecture Review Agenda Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether weekly-arch-review-agenda-template applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team produce ≥1 ADR per month AND have a named architect?

branch.conclusion: Hold 30-min walkthrough; still produce ≥1 decision (defer counts).

example.description: When `yes AND adr_backlog>0` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
